user_request: Medium mode: test three shop references.

projects.title: Sample Medium Shop
projects.search_line: Medium project search: retail shop references. NO labels are document numbers, not value ranking.
core_judgment: This medium sample verifies the reduced project-search template.
It keeps image, information, core judgment, reference tables, risk notes, and conclusion.
It must not restore the removed deep sections.
reference_points: Keeps judgment while lowering report weight.
Use the medium template block only.
Risk and conclusion become sections 4 and 5.
The report should not output image folders.
Embed the chosen image into Word.
direction_suggestions: Use a clear entrance and display rhythm.
Keep a simple and durable background.
Keep storage and staff workflow usable.
risks: Do not copy a flagship scale into a small shop.
Keep visual identity balanced with everyday operation.
conclusion: Sample Medium Shop is useful for verifying the medium renderer.
The result should read like a reduced deep report, not a card.
A real report should replace this sample data with verified cases and accurate images.
